programme.title: The Great Canadian Baking Show
programme.desc: Ten amateur bakers from Canada arrive at the Baking Tent to start their quest for the cake plate.

programme.title: Crime Scene Kitchen
programme.desc: Six pairs of family members put their culinary forensic skills to the test by putting together clues from the kitchen to recreate desserts that were baked there.

programme.title: Live: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Utah Mammoth and the Vegas Golden Knights meet for Game 1 of the Western Conference First Round at T-Mobile Arena. Utah won the regular-season series 2-1, including a dominant 4-0 shutout on March 19. Jack Eichel leads Vegas with 90 points.

programme.title: The National
programme.desc: CBC's flagship nightly news program, featuring the day's top stories with in-depth and original journalism; Adrienne Arsenault and Ian Hanomansing anchor.

programme.title: Live: CBC Ontario News
programme.desc: A comprehensive look at the day's top stories.

programme.title: The Nature of Things
programme.desc: The remarkable story of a solitary wolf living against the odds and its close bond with renowned wildlife photographer Cheryl Alexander.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy is hired to do a horse clinic with a group of inmates.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Nicki Chapman is on the hunt for a Pembrokeshire property with a holiday let.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Denise Nurse helps a couple so fed up with the eight-hour round trip to see their son in Northumbria that they've decided to move there instead; Denise has the keys to some lovely properties and also pays a visit to Northumberland National Park.

programme.desc: What's going on in Canada and the world; a ten-minute dose of big news stories.

programme.desc: More Man uses a tongue twister to multiply himself; now there are too many More Men moving around in Exclamation Park.

programme.desc: While herding a large group of dinos, the Rancher's mission is thrown off track by a loud Psittacosaurus named Squawk.
